data.name: rDNS
data.description: Allows clients and administrators to create rDNS PTRs from within SynergyCP.
changelog: Fixed rdns:sync-to-dns reporting all records as both succeeded and failed when the provider returns a non-string result.
Fixed entity deletion being blocked by orphan PTR foreign key constraint.
Added Cloudflare as a DNS provider for reverse DNS PTR records.
PTR create/update/delete log messages now include the IP and PTR entry.
Security hardening: input validation, authorization checks, error message sanitization, and Cloudflare API response validation.
